variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of goods sold appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent COGS row ('Cost of goods sold'), so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to selling, administrative, or R&D expenses appears in the operating section above financial lines. Since the selected XSGA bucket is composed of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative Expenses', and 'Research and Development Expenses', and no separate same-level D&A rows are shown, D&A is assumed embedded in those selected rows. Also, because 'Research and Development Expenses' is already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, there is no basis here to add any separate R&D D&A row.
